debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ (x : ℝ), ‖f x‖ ≤ C

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have h1 := ht
  specialize h1 x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (x - t + t)‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x - t)‖ + ‖f (x - t + t) - f (x - t)‖ := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using norm_add_le _ _
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      gcongr
      all_goals
        try
          linarith [IsRelDenseWith.pos hl]

obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := ht
  have hpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  have h1 : IsLinftyAP 1 t f := by
    specialize hl 0
    obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy₀, hyl⟩, hyE⟩ := hl
    exact hyE
  have hbdd : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
    intro x
    calc
      ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
      _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + ‖f (0 + x) - f 0‖ := by
        simpa using norm_add_le (f 0) (f x - f 0)
      _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
        have := h1 0
        simpa using this
  exact ⟨‖f 0‖ + 1, hbdd⟩

  obtain ⟨t, ht, hft⟩ := hl 0

          _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by gcongr

obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := ht
  have hpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy₀, hyl⟩, hy⟩ := hl 0

obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := ht
  have hpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have h1 := ht
  specialize h1 x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (x - t + t)‖ := by congr 1; ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x - t)‖ + ‖f (x - t + t) - f (x - t)‖ := by
      simpa using norm_sub_le (f (x - t + t)) (f (x - t))
    _ ≤ ‖f (x - t)‖ + 1 := by gcongr; simpa using h1
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have h2 := ht
      specialize h2 (x - t)
      calc
        ‖f (x - t)‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + ‖f (x - t) - f 0‖ := by
          simpa using norm_sub_le (f (x - t)) (f 0)
        _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by gcongr; simpa using h2

  use ‖f t‖ + 1

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have := ht x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (0 + x) - f 0‖ + ‖f 0‖ := by simpa using norm_add_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + ‖f 0‖ := by linarith [this]
    _ = ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by ring

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have h1 := ht
  simp only [IsLinftyAP, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h1
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + t + (x - t))‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (0 + t)‖ + ‖f (x) - f (0 + t)‖ := by
      simpa using norm_add_le (f (0 + t)) (f x - f (0 + t))
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 + ‖f x - f (0 + t)‖ := by
      have := h1 (x - t)
      simpa using this
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have := h1 (x - t)
      linarith [norm_nonneg (f x - f (0 + t))]

  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1

  have h1 := ht
  have h2 := IsLinftyAP.mul_fun (fun _ => by norm_num) (fun _ => by norm_num) h1 h1

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht, hft⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have := hft x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + ‖f (t + x) - f x‖ := by
      simpa using (norm_sub_rev _ _).trans (le_of_eq (by simp [add_comm]))
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + 1 := by gcongr
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have := hft 0
      calc
        ‖f (t + x)‖ = ‖f (x + t)‖ := by simp [add_comm]
        _ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ := by
          simpa using (norm_sub_rev _ _).trans (le_of_eq (by simp))
        _ ≤ ‖f x‖ + 1 := by gcongr
      linarith

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht, hft⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (x - t + t)‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x - t)‖ + ‖f (x - t + t) - f (x - t)‖ := by
      simpa using norm_add_le (f (x - t)) (f (x - t + t) - f (x - t))
    _ ≤ ‖f (x - t)‖ + 1 := by gcongr; exact hft (x - t)
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have := hl (x - t)
      obtain ⟨s, hs, hfs⟩ := this
      calc
        ‖f (x - t)‖ = ‖f (x - t + s - s)‖ := by ring
        _ ≤ ‖f (x - t + s)‖ + ‖f (x - t) - f (x - t + s)‖ := by
          simpa using norm_add_le (f (x - t + s)) (f (x - t) - f (x - t + s))
        _ ≤ ‖f (x - t + s)‖ + 1 := by gcongr; exact hfs (x - t)
        _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
          have : x - t + s ∈ Set.Ico 0 l := ⟨hs.1, hs.2⟩
          -- But we don't need the exact value, just that some point in [0,l) gives a bound
          -- Actually, simpler: since t ∈ E where E is the set of 1-almost periods,
          -- then for any y, ‖f(y + t) - f(y)‖ ≤ 1.
          -- In particular, take y = 0: ‖f(t) - f(0)‖ ≤ 1, so ‖f(t)‖ ≤ ‖f(0)‖ + 1.
          -- But we need a bound for all x. Use that there exists an almost period near x.
          sorry

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have := ht x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + ‖f (0 + x) - f (t + x)‖ := by
      simpa using norm_sub_le_norm_add_norm (f (t + x)) (f x)
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + 1 := by
      simpa [IsLinftyAP] using this
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      simpa using norm_sub_le_norm_add_norm (f 0) (f (t + x))

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have h1 := ht
  have h2 := IsLinftyAP ε t f
  simp at h1
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + ‖f x - f 0‖ := by
      simpa using norm_add_le_of_sub_norm_le_left (f 0) (f x)
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have h3 := h1
      have h4 := h3
      have h5 := h4
      have h6 := h5
      linarith [h1]

obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := ht
  have hpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  have h1 : IsLinftyAP 1 t f := by
    specialize hl 0
    obtain ⟨y, hy₀, hyl, hy⟩ := hl
    exact hy
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have h2 : ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ ≤ 1 := h1 x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (x + t - t)‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ := by
      simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using norm_sub_rev (f (x + t)) (f x)
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have h3 : ∃ y ∈ Set.Ico 0 l, x + t + y ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP 1 t f} := hl (x + t)
      obtain ⟨y, hy₀, hyl, hy⟩ := h3
      have h4 : ‖f (x + t + y) - f (x + t)‖ ≤ 1 := hy (x + t)
      have h5 : ‖f (x + t + y) - f 0‖ ≤ ‖f (x + t + y) - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f 0‖ := by
        simpa using norm_sub_le (f (x + t + y)) (f (x + t)) (f 0)
      have h6 : ‖f (x + t) - f 0‖ ≤ ‖f (x + t + y) - f 0‖ + ‖f (x + t + y) - f (x + t)‖ := by
        simpa using norm_sub_le (f (x + t)) (f (x + t + y)) (f 0)
      have h7 : ‖f (x + t + y) - f 0‖ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
        calc
          ‖f (x + t + y) - f 0‖ ≤ ‖f (x + t + y) - f y‖ + ‖f y - f 0‖ := by
            simpa using norm_sub_le (f (x + t + y)) (f y) (f 0)
          _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by
            have h8 : ‖f (x + t + y) - f y‖ ≤ 1 := h1 (y + x + t)
            have h9 : ‖f y - f 0‖ ≤ 1 := h1 0
            linarith
      linarith

      · have := hft (x - y)
        simpa using this

obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := ht
  have hpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  have h1 : IsLinftyAP 1 t f := by simpa using hl 0
  have hbdd : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
    intro x
    obtain ⟨y, ⟨hy₀, hyl⟩, hxy⟩ := hl x
    calc
      ‖f x‖ = ‖f (x + y - y)‖ := by simp
      _ = ‖f ((x + y) - y)‖ := by ring
      _ ≤ ‖f (x + y)‖ + ‖f (x + y) - f ((x + y) - y)‖ := by
          simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using norm_sub_rev_le (f (x + y)) (f ((x + y) - y))
      _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 + 1 := by
          gcongr
          · have := h1 (x + y - t)
            simp_all
          · have := h1 0
            simp_all
  exact ⟨‖f 0‖ + 1, hbdd⟩

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have := ht x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + t + (x - t))‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f (0 + t)‖ + ‖f x - f (0 + t)‖ := by
      simpa using norm_add_le (f (0 + t)) (f x - f (0 + t))
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      gcongr
      all_goals
        try
          linarith [ht 0, ht x]

obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 1)
  obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := hl 0
  use ‖f 0‖ + 1
  intro x
  have := ht x
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f (0 + x)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + ‖f (t + x) - f x‖ := by
      simpa using norm_sub_le_norm_add_norm (f (t + x)) (f x)
    _ ≤ ‖f (t + x)‖ + 1 := by gcongr; simpa using this
    _ ≤ ‖f 0‖ + 1 := by
      have := ht 0
      simpa using calc
        ‖f (t + x)‖ = ‖f (x + t)‖ := by simp [add_comm]
        _ ≤ ‖f x‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ := by
          simpa using norm_sub_le_norm_add_norm (f (x + t)) (f x)
        _ ≤ ‖f x‖ + 1 := by gcongr; simpa using ht x
